calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2025 Dismissal - No Appearance

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An (I) Order For Discharge And Dismissal Of Plaintiff East West Bank From Interpleader Action And (11) Order For Plaintiff East West Bank To Deposit Interpleader Funds To The Clerk Of The San Francisco Superior Court; Accounting And Request For Attorney'S Fees And Costs; Declaration Of Curtis C. Jung
Off Calendar Jun-25-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff East West Bank's unopposed Motion For An (I) Order For Discharge And Dismissal Of Plaintiff East West Bank From Interpleader Action And (2) Order For Plaintiff East West Bank To Deposit Interpleader Funds To The Clerk Of The San Francisco Superior Court; and (3) Accounting And Request For Attorney's Fees And Costs is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, Plaintiff is discharged from this action and from any liability to Defendants arising from the Interpleader Funds and the Account; Plaintiff is awarded the total sum of $30,097.70 as attorney's fees and costs; Plaintiff is ordered to deposit the balance of the Interpleader Funds ($145,259.39 less $30,097.70) with the Court.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2025 Set For Trial On Aug-04-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2024 Continued To Mar-05-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
